[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Jenbean''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was one of the watch officers of the [[Senate Communications Center]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He received a transmission that showed [[Reija Momen]] reading a statement prepared by [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]] that described Tonith's plans for exterminating his hostages. Jenbean delivered this transmission to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. After Palpatine decided to ignore the transmission, Jenbean retransmitted it to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zozridor Slayke]] on [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]].
